company_name: H2O So Clean Pool & Spa Services

hero.headline: San Diego's Most Trusted Pool Care Team
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your favorite place to unwind — not another weekend chore. H2O So Clean handles every detail so you can skip the chemicals and go straight to cannonballs.
checkmarks: Certified Pool Operator on every visit
Serving all of San Diego County

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool, Spa & Fountain Care<br class="hidden md:block"> Handled From Start to Finish
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency repairs, Daniel and the H2O So Clean team keep your water features sparkling so you never have to think twice about water chemistry again.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Full-service weekly and bi-weekly pool maintenance including chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and equipment checks. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready year round.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Care
cards.description: Complete spa maintenance covering water chemistry, filter cleaning, jet inspection, and surface care. Enjoy a safe, relaxing soak every single time without lifting a finger.

cards.title: Fountain Maintenance
cards.description: Professional fountain service including water treatment, pump inspection, debris removal, and algae prevention. Keep your decorative water features looking pristine and flowing beautifully.

cards.title: Repairs & Installations
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, heaters, filters, automation systems, and plumbing. We also handle new equipment installations and upgrades to keep everything running at peak efficiency.

cards.title: Free $220 Consultation
cards.description: A no-obligation visit that includes a full service of your pool or spa, a 13-factor water chemistry test, a 45-point equipment check, and a system efficiency evaluation — all completely free.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Testing
cards.description: Precise 13-factor water analysis that goes far beyond basic test strips. We identify imbalances early, protect your equipment from corrosion, and keep water gentle on skin and eyes.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Sparkling Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Schedule your complimentary $220-value consultation. We'll perform a full service visit, test 13 water chemistry factors, run a 45-point equipment check, and evaluate your system's efficiency — no strings attached.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Care Plan
steps.description: Daniel personally reviews your results and recommends exactly what your pool, spa, or fountain needs. Honest advice, fair pricing, and zero upselling — we even share money-saving tips that don't involve paid service.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy the Water
steps.description: Your water stays crystal clear and perfectly balanced. With a Certified Pool Operator handling every detail, you get peace of mind and more time in the pool instead of working on it.

about.label: Why San Diego Trusts H2O So Clean
about.headline: Owner-Operated, Personally Accountable, Always Honest
about.description: Founded in 2018 by Daniel, H2O So Clean was built on a simple idea: pool service should be personal, professional, and fair. As a Certified Pool Operator and licensed contractor, Daniel brings hands-on expertise to every job across San Diego County. When you call, you talk to the person who actually cares for your pool — not a call center. That personal accountability is why we hold a perfect 5-star Google rating after 33 reviews.

features.title: Licensed & Certified Professionals
features.description: Certified Pool Operator #623805 and Contractor's License #1067459 — your pool is in qualified, insured hands every single visit.

features.title: Honest, Transparent Advice
features.description: We share money-saving tips even when they don't involve paid work. Our goal is your trust, not a bigger invoice.

features.title: Responsive Owner-Operated Service
features.description: Daniel personally oversees every account. Questions get answered fast, problems get solved the same day, and you never feel like just another number.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Surprises. Ever.
pricing.subtitle: Every plan starts with a free $220-value consultation. No contracts, no hidden fees — just honest service at honest prices.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call Daniel directly and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We've maintained a perfect 5-star rating because we don't consider a job done until you're thrilled with the result.

faqs.question: What does the free consultation include?
faqs.answer: Our complimentary consultation — valued at $220 — includes a full service of your pool, spa, or fountain, a 13-factor water chemistry test, a 45-point equipment check, and a system efficiency evaluation. There's absolutely no obligation to sign up for ongoing service.

faqs.question: Do you service spas and fountains too?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide full maintenance, repair, and installation services for pools, spas, hot tubs, and decorative fountains throughout San Diego County. Same great care, same fair pricing across all water features.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled for their free consultation within a few days. For urgent repairs or equipment failures, we offer priority scheduling. Call Daniel directly and we'll work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We hold a Certified Pool Operator certification (#623805) and a California Contractor's License (#1067459). Every job is performed to professional standards with full insurance coverage for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of San Diego County from our Carmel Valley office, including La Jolla, Del Mar, Rancho Santa Fe, Encinitas, Poway, Scripps Ranch, and surrounding communities. If you're in San Diego County, we can take care of you.

testimonials.name: Julie Miller
testimonials.text: Dan recently helped me with a pool heater connectivity issue and was so patient walking me through all the steps. He is super knowledgeable and professional. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Samuel M.
testimonials.text: Pool heater stopped working and filter was leaking. Called H2O which was the best thing I did. Daniel was so nice, friendly, and knowledgeable. Got a few other quotes but Daniel had the best prices and fastest service. Will definitely do business with them again.

testimonials.name: Jessie Bishop
testimonials.text: We moved into our home with a pool a year ago and have interacted with 4 different pool service companies with limited success. Daniel at H2O So Clean far exceeded our expectations and impressed us with his knowledge and customer service.

contact.headline:
Ready for Pool Care You Can

contact.subtitle: Book your free $220-value consultation today. No contracts, no pressure — just an honest assessment of what your pool needs from a Certified Pool Operator.
